name: Full Consensus (Opening Burst)
hypothesis: The parent spec showed exceptional WR but also session-dependent performance. Its complex interaction of imbalance, book shape, and trade flow might be most potent during the opening session (first 15 mins) where information flow is highest. This filter isolates the signal to that specific regime.
formula: ((obi_1 + obi_ex_bbo) - 2 * ask_depth_concentration) > 1.5 AND zscore(trade_imbalance_signed, 300) > 0.1 AND minute_of_session < 15
mutation_note: In the spirit of the 'timevarying_threshold' feedback, a regime filter (`minute_of_session < 15`) was added to adapt the signal to a specific, high-volatility time of day instead of using a dynamic threshold.
